sections.title: Corporate Structure and Ownership

requirements: Legal entity type and registration details
Ownership structure including intermediate holding companies

global_instructions: Maintain objective, evidence-based tone. All claims must be traceable to source documents. Flag any gaps in available information.

terminology.UBO: Ultimate Beneficial Owner - natural person with >25% ownership or control
